description: Tw() sync Statsig gate returns false for known kill-switch gates (tengu_disable_bypass_permissions_mode, tengu_log_datadog_events, tengu_kairos_cron, tengu_cold_compact). Defangs Anthropic's ability to remotely toggle these via Statsig. Other gate names fall through to the original logic.

patches.search_regex: function Tw\(q\)\{let K=nk6\(\);if\(K&&q in K\)return Boolean\(K\[q\]\);
patches.description: Allowlist known kill-switch gates to always return false
